summary: Frontend-only verification of 3 sidebar/board UX improvements: (1) sidebar resize with persistence + double-click reset, (2) drag-and-drop board <-> folder/root, (3) BoardContextMenu 'Move to folder' submenu. All features work end-to-end. No regressions observed.

sidebar_resize.details: Initial width 256px. Mouse-drag handle right ~120px -> width 372px. After page reload width persisted at 372px (localStorage 'sidebar_width'=372). Double-click handle reset width to 256px and localStorage updated to 256.

empty_folder_placeholder.details: 'Pipeline Group' folder shows 'Drop a board here' (was 'No boards').

dnd_board_to_folder.details: Dispatched HTML5 dragstart/dragover/drop with DataTransfer text/board-id. PUT /folders/boards/{id}/move?folder_id=<f> fired. Toast 'Moved - Board moved successfully' shown. Sidebar tree re-rendered with Pipeline indented under 'Pipeline Group'.

dnd_board_to_root.details: Dispatching drop events on data-testid='sidebar-root-droparea' fires PUT with empty folder_id. Board removed from folder; toast shown.

bcm_move_to_workspace_rename.details: Submenu label is 'Move to workspace' (renamed from 'Move to').

bcm_move_to_folder_submenu.details: data-testid='board-move-to-folder' submenu trigger present. Hover reveals folder list. Per-folder items have data-testid='board-move-to-folder-<folderId>' with correct folder names. Clicking a folder fires PUT /folders/boards/{id}/move?folder_id=<id>.

bcm_remove_from_folder.details: When board is in a folder, 'Remove from folder' item (data-testid='board-remove-from-folder') is visible. Hidden when board is not in any folder. Clicking it fires PUT with empty folder_id and shows 'Removed from folder' toast.

bcm_when_no_current_folder.details: With board not in folder, only folder list is shown; 'Remove from folder' is correctly hidden.

critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar.jsx (Loose end, low priority): Sidebar's BoardItem 3-dot menu only renders when folders.length > 0. Once the only folder is deleted while user is on page, boards in folders cannot be removed via the kebab. Fine for current spec since drag/drop and BCM cover that case.

BoardContextMenu.jsx: After 'Move to folder' from BCM, the sidebar tree reflects the change only when WorkspaceContext.fetchBoards is called. BCM calls onUpdate?.() (BoardPage refresh) but does NOT refresh the sidebar's board list directly. In practice WorkspaceContext refreshes on navigation; consider invoking a workspace fetchBoards to keep sidebar in sync immediately while still on the board page.

Sidebar.jsx resize handler: width is persisted via a useEffect that writes on every change while !resizing; works fine but a small debouncing or single write on mouseup would reduce localStorage churn (cosmetic).
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing 'Pipeline Group' folder and Pipeline board. End-state: Pipeline board left in root (not inside folder), 'Pipeline Group' folder left empty as instructed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sidebar resize uses mousedown on data-testid='sidebar-resize-handle'; persistence in localStorage 'sidebar_width'. DnD requires programmatic DataTransfer dispatch in Playwright since the runtime drag simulation does not propagate setData; use page.evaluate with new DragEvent + new DataTransfer. BoardContextMenu trigger is in Header (NOT inside <main>) -- locate buttons with svg.lucide-more-horizontal and filter to those NOT inside [data-testid='app-sidebar'].
